reviews.comment:
Practicamente en medio de la nada, ahí está el ACA, muy buena atención y servicio, parada casi obligada. Además del Servicompras hay espacio arbolado con parrillas, si la parada es más extensa.

(Translated by Google)
Practically in the middle of nowhere, there's the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), with excellent service and attention—a must-stop. Besides the convenience store, there's a wooded area with grills if you're staying longer.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtd0s3eXNnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Ha mejorado mucho sus instalaciones y es un punto importante para recargar combustible en un largo tramo de la RN 60.

(Translated by Google)
Its facilities have improved considerably, and it is an important refueling point along a long stretch of the RN 60.
